meaning: n.[医]腺状肿大,扁桃腺肥大
examples: Has he ever had trouble with his tonsils or adenoids?
Enlarged adenoids may restrict the breathing of children.
Adenoids trap bacteria, but they're also prone to swelling and infection.
Losing weight may help, as may having the tonsils or adenoids removed if the obstruction is severe enough to warrant surgery.
